profiledesc.creation: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on 2022-07-20 18:44:06 UTC.

repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

did.abstract: Booklets relating to food and cooking.

defitem.label: Contact Information:
defitem.item: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu

defitem.label: EAD encoding:
defitem.item: Jessica Shon, February 20, 2009 Eileen Keating, January 19, 2012

scopecontent.head: COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
scopecontent.p: Booklets relating to food and cooking.

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: Food and recipe booklets collection, #8006. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.

relatedmaterial.head: RELATED MATERIALS
relatedmaterial.p: Related material in collection #8568, Diane Scrima Collection of Recipe Booklets and Cookbooks.

controlaccess.subject: Food conservation.
Cooking (Gelatin)
World War II.
World War, 1914-1918 -- Civilian participation.
Formulas, recipes, etc. -- United States -- History.
Cooking, American -- History.

did.unittitle: Center for Service in Public Interest
Recipes/Recipe Card - including Kate Smith's Favorite Recipes (1939)
Recipes/Recipe Card - including Kate Smith's Favorite Recipes (1939)
Rice Council - Great Dinners for Six
Brochures for Corn Syrup, Mazola Oil, Hellmann's Mayo, Skippy Peanut Butter
"Food of Our Fathers" - Institute of Food Technologists

odd.head: General
odd.p: Blank book with printed title "Recipes: my friends' and my own," copyright 1900, with recipes written in by hand or glued in as newspaper clippings.

odd.head: General
odd.p: Untitled recipe book, with signature MRN, 1860 on front pastedown. Mostly cake recipes, together with some for vegetables (such as pickled cabbage), soda water, etc. Poor condition, fragile binding, pages stained.

did.unittitle: Commercial recipe booklets-Karo Cook Book by Emma Churchman Hewitt; "Superior Salads," from Duffy's Apple Juice Vinegar; "Directions for Operating 'Lorain' Oven Heat Regulator," American Stove Company; Book of Formulas for Preparing of Syrups, Etc.," Crown Cordial and Extract Company; "The Celebrated Vienna Pressed Yeast"
"Just a Cook Book for Economical Gas Cooking," American Stove Company
"100 Ways to Better Health," Battle Creek Food Company
The Housekeeper's Receipt Book, Carter's Compound Extract of Smart Weed
"The Practical Cookbook," by Mrs. H. M. Robinson, New York: Abbey and Barrett
"Choice Gleanings," Columbus Avenue Church, Boston, MA.
"Tompkins County Old Time Recipes and Philosophy of Housekeeping," Cornell University
Money-Saving Main Dishes, USDA and "Hot from the Oven," cookie recipes compiled by Elinor Genung Allen
Family Fare: Food Management and Recipes, USDA
"Holiday Meals For Wartime", by Mary Lee Taylor
"Drinking and Dining Recipes from the Original Thirteen Colonies", by Lord Calvert Whiskey Company
"The History of the Spoon, Knife and Fork", by Reed and Barton
"The History of Spices" by American Spice Trade Association
"A Handbook on the Jewish Dietary Laws"
"Thoughts for Teas" by Saga Food Service
Notebook with clippings of World War I recipes, especially for meatless and wheatless meals
"From Tree to Table", Curtice Brothers Company, Preservers, Rochester, New York
D.M. Osborne and Company, "Handy Book for House and Farm"
"Apples for You!", Alice L. Spencer (Recipes) and E. Stuart Hubbard (Horticulturalist)
"Trail Cookery for Girl Scouts", by the Home Economics Dept., Kellogg Company, Battle Creek, Michigan
"A Manual of Cooking for Boy Scouts", by the Home Economics Dept., Kellogg Company, Battle Creek, Michigan
"Cheese", by Luella Sherman Mortensen and Beulah V. Gillaspie (McCall's Magazine)
"Canned Salmon Delicacies", by Lola M. Cremeans (University of Alaska)
"Health-for-Victory Club Meal Planning Guide / Early Summer Home Canning: What to Can ... How to Do It", by Home Economics Institute
"Perfect Pies and How to Make Them", by National Household Service and The Proctor and Gamble Co.
"Wonder Sandwich Suggestions", by Alice Adams Proctor
"Spring Suggestions, Including Lenten Recipes", by The Food Education Bureau
"When You Entertain: A Woman's Home Companion Booklet"
"Your War Garden for 1944: Helpful Information from Firestone Farm and Garden Service Bureau"
"Food and Health", by Lydia E. Pinkham Medicine Co.
"Cook with Milk", by the Extension Service of the College of Agriculture, University of Wisconsin, Madison
"Ways to Use Wisconsin Apples", by the Extension Service of the College of Agriculture, University of Wisconsin, Madison
"Rumford Cook Book", by Fannie Merritt Farmer (and the Rumford Chemical Works)
"Everyday Uses for Cherries", by Luella Mortenson
"Bananas Take a Bow ... in Attractive New Dishes for the Up-to-Date Hostess"
"Banana Salad Bazaar", by the Home Economics Dept., Fruit Dispatch Co.
"Quick-Quick-Quick 16 Smackin'-Good Meal Ideas with the New Minute Rice", by General Foods Corp.
"What Shall I Cook Today? 124 Thrifty, Healthful Tested Recipes" with Spry (Pure Vegetable Shortening), by the Lever Brothers Co.
"Magic Short-Cut Recipes for the Automatic Refrigerator"
"Minute Cook Book", by the Minute Tapioca Co., Orange, Mass.
"Menu Magic", by the National Biscuit Company
"Eggs: 100 Tempting Ways to Serve Them", by the New England Fresh Egg Institute, Worcester, Mass.
Milk Recipes by H. P. Hood and Sons
"Recipes for Today", by General Foods Corp.
"Tested Recipes: Successful Baking for Flavor and Texture", by Martha Lee Anderson
"The Right Food for Your Family", by the Vermont State Nutrition Committee and the Maltex Company
"What to Eat and Why", by Alice F. Blood
"Atlas Book of Recipes and Helpful Information about Canning",
"The Sunny Side of Life Book", by the Kellogg Company, Battle Creek, Michigan
"A New Way of Living: Come Over to the Sunny Side of Life", by the Kellogg Company, Battle Creek, Michigan
"Nutrition: Important Flashes of Nutrition News", by the Quaker Oats Company
"The Student Home Economist: A National Newspaper for Home Economics Students"
"Household Nutrition: A Timely and Reliable Clip-Sheet for the Women"
"Plain and Fancy Gravy Dishes" Campbell Soup Company
Campbell's Red Kettle Soup Mix Recipes
"50 Classic Bean Dishes" Campbell Soup Company
"It's Home From Work We Go" Campbell Soup Company
